package.name: AssemblyCut
package.description: Cut multiple PartDesign::Body objects in an assembly with a single sketch. Opens a Pocket dialog for each body with auto-detection of which bodies are intersected by the sketch. Supports reordering, depth preset per body, and full FreeCAD Pocket parameters (taper, direction, through-all, etc.).
package.author: Cipa

workbench.description: Toolbar in PartDesign workbench to cut multiple bodies with one sketch.
